commands.description: Install and configure one or more AdonisJS packages. Runs npm install followed by the package configure hook
help: Use this command instead of manually running npm install + configure separately.
Accepts shorthand names: "vinejs" for @vinejs/vine, "edge" for edge.js.

flags.name: verbose
flags.description: Display logs in verbose mode

flags.name: packageManager
flags.description: Define the package manager you want to use

flags.name: dev
flags.description: Should we install the package as a dev dependency

flags.name: force
flags.description: Forcefully overwrite existing files

args.name: names
args.description: Package names to install and configure

commands.description: Build application for production by compiling frontend assets and TypeScript source to JavaScript
help: Create the production build using the following command.
The assets bundler dev server runs automatically after detecting vite config or webpack config files
You may pass vite CLI args using the --assets-args command line flag.

flags.name: ignoreTsErrors
flags.description: Ignore TypeScript errors and continue with the build process

flags.name: packageManager
flags.description: Define the package manager to copy the appropriate lock file

flags.name: tsconfig
flags.description: Define the tsconfig path

commands.description: Run the configure hook of an already-installed package. Use "add" command instead to both install and configure in one step

flags.name: verbose
flags.description: Display logs in verbose mode

flags.name: force
flags.description: Forcefully overwrite existing files

commands.description: Copy scaffolding stubs from a package to your application for customization. Stubs are templates used by make:* commands

flags.name: pkg
flags.description: Mention package name for searching stubs

args.name: stubPath
args.description: Path to the stubs directory or a single stub file

commands.description: Add a new environment variable to .env, .env.example, and its validation rule to start/env.ts

flags.name: type
flags.description: Type of the variable

flags.name: enumValues
flags.description: Allowed values for the enum type in a comma-separated list

args.name: name
args.description: Variable name. Will be converted to screaming snake case

commands.description: Generate a cryptographically secure APP_KEY and write it to the .env file. Use --show to print without writing

flags.name: show
flags.description: Display the key on the terminal, instead of writing it to .env file

flags.name: force
flags.description: Force update .env file in production environment

commands.description: Display the resolved adonisrc.ts configuration as JSON, including providers, preloads, commands, and meta files
List all registered routes with their HTTP methods, URL patterns, handlers, and middleware

flags.name: middleware
flags.description: View routes that includes all the mentioned middleware names. Use * to see routes that are using one or more middleware

flags.name: ignoreMiddleware
flags.description: View routes that does not include all the mentioned middleware names. Use * to see routes that are using zero middleware

flags.name: json
flags.description: Get routes list as a JSON string

flags.name: table
flags.description: View list of routes as a table

flags.name: jsonl
flags.description: Get routes as JSONL, one JSON object per line (optimized for AI agents)

args.name: match
args.description: Find routes matching the given keyword. Route name, pattern and controller name will be searched against the keyword

commands.description: Create a new Ace CLI command class in commands/

flags.name: contentsFrom
flags.description: Use the contents of the given file as the generated output

flags.name: force
flags.description: Forcefully overwrite existing files

commands.description: Create a new HTTP controller class in app/controllers. Use --resource for CRUD methods or --api for API-only CRUD (no create/edit)

flags.name: singular
flags.description: Generate controller in singular form

flags.name: resource
flags.description: Generate resourceful controller with methods to perform CRUD actions on a resource

flags.name: api
flags.description: Generate resourceful controller without the "edit" and the "create" methods

flags.name: contentsFrom
flags.description: Use the contents of the given file as the generated output

flags.name: force
flags.description: Forcefully overwrite existing files

args.name: actions
args.description: Create controller with custom method names

commands.description: Create a new preload file in start/ and optionally register it in adonisrc.ts. Preload files run during app boot

flags.name: register

flags.name: environments
flags.description: Define the preload file's environment. Accepted values are "web,console,test,repl"

commands.description: Start an interactive REPL session with the application booted and IoC container available
Start the development HTTP server. Use --watch for auto-restart on file change or --hmr for hot module replacement
help: Start the development server with file watcher using the following command.
You can also start the server with HMR support using the following command.
The assets bundler dev server runs automatically after detecting vite config or webpack config files
You may pass vite CLI args using the --assets-args command line flag.

flags.name: hmr
flags.description: Start the server with HMR support

flags.name: watch
flags.description: Watch filesystem and restart the HTTP server on file change

flags.name: poll
flags.description: Use polling to detect filesystem changes

flags.name: clear
flags.description: Clear the terminal for new logs after file change

commands.description: Run tests using Japa test runner. Supports filtering by suite, file, tag, and group. Use --watch for re-runs on file change

flags.name: files
flags.description: Filter tests by the filename

flags.name: tags
flags.description: Filter tests by tags

flags.name: groups
flags.description: Filter tests by parent group title

flags.name: tests
flags.description: Filter tests by test title

flags.name: reporters
flags.description: Activate one or more test reporters

flags.name: watch
flags.description: Watch filesystem and re-run tests on file change

flags.name: poll
flags.description: Use polling to detect filesystem changes

flags.name: timeout
flags.description: Define default timeout for all tests

flags.name: retries
flags.description: Define default retries for all tests

flags.name: failed
flags.description: Execute tests failed during the last run

flags.name: clear
flags.description: Clear the terminal for new logs after file change

args.name: suites
args.description: Mention suite names to run tests for selected suites
